programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Tallahassee, Fla., officers search for a wanted suspect, followed by a traffic stop in Berkeley where drugs are discovered; police respond to a fire in Bradford County and in Tulsa, Okla., a man attempts to elude officers by fleeing the scene.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Greene County, police pursue a group of motorcyclists suspected of evading capture; in Salinas, a van reportedly containing stolen jewelry makes its way home; in Indiana, a vehicle search takes a turn when a woman struggles with a spicy chicken nugget.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Oklahoma, a driver is surprised when police reportedly find a gun tucked under his seat; in Lawrence, a man suspected of impersonating his son finally drops the act.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Salinas, police discover a backseat full of beer cans that may explain why one man chose a traffic light for his nap; in Missoula, officers help corral a group of wild horses blocking the roadway.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: The K9 units are on the chase with pursuits in Richland and Pasco Counties, a fleeing vehicle triggers a high-speed pursuit in Franklin County, and it's sassy backtalk in Mission, Texas.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: A modified muscle car in Greene County raises suspicion; in Richland, officers investigate reports of shots fired; a Pasco County deputy and K9 join as special guests.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: Officers in Salinas respond to a bank robbery; wild pursuit in Warwick turns into a foot chase; K9 Shep's nose is put to work in Pasco.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: One officer takes charge in an El Paso street fight while another pursues speeding motorcycles in Warwick, and a search for an armed robbery suspect in Salinas.

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: For Lisa, the hustle is real; Ivy and Pops drop by on their way home from vacation and end up schooling the other buyers; Dave comes out swinging but ends up just playing games; Brandi and Cameron almost take their profits sky-high.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers head to Montebello, where there are a number of lockers for auction; Brandi has the resale market covered; Ivy mines his way into some vintage safety gear.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny learns about being a not-so-easy rider; Rene and Casey string up a fair amount of hits in their unit full of boxes; Dusty and Lupe lead with their parenting senses, while Lisa's animal instincts lead her to the real cheddar.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In a shocking incident, a terrified woman has to run to a neighbor for help after another neighbor breaks into her apartment; in New York, one unfriendly neighbor has a mouth as tough as the city's streets.
